user.title: Copper Labs
user.description: How would you like to sign in?

email.title: Sign in to Copper
email.description: Enter the email address for your Copper account. We'll send a one-time code to it.

code.title: Enter your code
code.description: Check your email for a 6-digit code from Copper and enter it here.

token.title: Refresh token
token.description: Paste a refresh token captured from the Copper app's POST to auth.copperlabs.com/oauth/token.

error.send_failed: Couldn't send a code to that address. Check the email and try again.
error.invalid_code: That code wasn't accepted. It may be wrong or expired — request a new one.
error.email_unsupported: This account can't use email sign-in. Use the 'Advanced: paste a refresh token' option instead.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Copper API.

abort.already_configured: This premise is already set up.
abort.no_premise: No premises found on this account.
abort.wrong_account: That sign-in belongs to a different premise than this entry. Sign in with the original account.

init.title: Copper Labs options
init.description: Choose a display unit per meter. Copper reports gas in CCF and water in US gallons; readings are converted into your chosen unit (e.g. m³ or L for European style). Debug logging writes detailed API activity to the Home Assistant log and stays on across restarts.
